query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, gameNumber, sport, market, pickSide, odds, result, awayScore, homeScore, anGameId FROM tracked_bets WHERE (awayTeam = 'HOU' AND homeTeam = 'BAL') OR id IN (60005, 60006) ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, gameNumber, sport, market, pickSide, odds, result, awayScore, homeScore, anGameId FROM tracked_bets WHERE (awayTeam = 'HOU' AND homeTeam = 'BAL') OR id IN (60005, 60006) ORDER BY id;
